{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615818273654145817","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"08年入坑的骨灰级老玩家，22年左右退坑，最近看DNF文看生气了，于是决定自己写一本，为此，游戏都重新下回来了。
汤汤会尽我所能写一本原汁原味的DNF文，过程中如有错漏，希望大家留言提醒哦，了解我的人都知道，咱别的不好说，绝对主打一个听劝！
然后的然后是，如果大家觉得这本书写的还行，烦请花费半分钟的时间，给个五星书评哦，这也是支持我写下去的动力，感谢感谢！🙏🏻
当然，要是有什么好的建议或者想法，也可以随时留言哦，作者会酌情吸纳（不能保证百分之百哈，毕竟作者有自己定好的大纲和剧情走向）☺️☺️☺️"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773199305,"group_id":"7614460767194074136","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"骨灰级DNF老玩家，emmmm，虽然脱坑好几年了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7R2AOxrsk6Zb5kE6Zdi9a4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/82ebe924aac64491bb251b9cbd8cef16~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531227&x-signature=s4HSBTXrrIGdKUb%2FfDVk6nYkbrI%3D","user_id":"479845024530936","user_name":"叶之汤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"479845024530936","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746329091,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7614460767194074136","book_info":{"abstract":"【DNF / 无系统 / 回忆杀】【强化 + 增幅 + 竞速 + 商人】
　　重生回 2010DNF 爆火的年代，江来发现自己的记忆只剩毒奶粉相关，股票投资彩票全不记得！
　　好在自带金手指 —— 提前预见强化结果！
　　“既然老天将我跟阿拉德绑在一起，那就给毒奶粉玩家们亿点点震撼吧！”
　　从此，阿拉德诞生一个传说：
　　那个人，不但是八百万勇士的精神支柱，更是巨商、强化王、增幅王、竞速王……
　　PS：不舔不贴无女师傅，前期视频攒人气，后期直播封神，最纯粹的 DNF
